nasb.text: After him Binnui the son of Henadad repaired another section, from the house of Azariah as far as the Angle and as far as the corner.

esv.text: After him Binnui the son of Henadad repaired another section, from the house of Azariah to the buttress and to the corner.

cnv.text: 這一段之後是希拿達的兒子賓內修築的另一段，從亞撒利雅的房屋，直到城牆的轉角，就是城角的地方。

ccb.text: 再下一段由希拿达的儿子宾内修筑，他从亚撒利雅的房子修到城墙的转角。
